message:
fix(mobile): resolve scroll flickering and UI glitches

Critical mobile performance fixes:

- Remove backdrop-filter: blur() from bottom-sheet backdrop, gesture hints,
  and swipe indicators - these cause severe repaint lag during scroll
- Replace skeleton shimmer animation to use GPU-accelerated transform
  instead of background-position (causes continuous repaints)
- Disable Lenis smooth scroll on touch devices - conflicts with native
  -webkit-overflow-scrolling causing double-scroll and jank
- Add will-change hints to position:fixed elements (control-deck, FAB,
  swipe indicators) for GPU layer optimization
- Reduce box-shadow blur radius on bottom-sheet and FAB for faster paints
- Disable continuous animations (scanline, CRT flicker) on mobile to
  prevent battery drain and frame drops
- Simplify swipe indicator animations from dual-animation to single
- Add mobile overrides for holographic theme backdrop-filters

These changes eliminate the main causes of scroll flickering on mobile:
1. Expensive backdrop-filter repaints during scroll
2. Lenis/native scroll conflict causing double event handling
3. Skeleton shimmer forcing continuous repaints
4. Too many position:fixed elements without GPU layer hints
